title: Weather on Friday: Drizzle along the coast and cloudy
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest update from the South African Weather Service, partly cloudy with light rain is expected on Friday 5 September.


> Regional weather forecast:


Western CapePartly cloudy and cool with light rain over the south-eastern coast from the late afternoon. The wind along the coast will be light to moderate north-easterly along the south in the morning, otherwise moderate south-westerly.


> The expected UVB sunburn index: High


Western half of the Eastern CapePartly cloudy and cool with isolated light showers and rain in places along the coast and adjacent interior. The wind along the coast will be moderate south easterly.

Eastern half of the Eastern CapePartly cloudy and cool with isolated showers and thundershowers. The wind along the coast will be light and variable, becoming light to moderate south-easterly in the afternoon, but south-westerly from the south in the evening.


> Expected temperatures for today:



> Extended weather forecast:


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
